title: OpenAI research and product leads detail GPT-Rosalind capabilities and benchmarks
summary: OpenAI research and product leads detail GPT-Rosalind capabilities and benchmarks GPT-Rosalind bests other models on LifeSciBench, including GPT-5.5, Grok 4.3 and Gemini 3.1 Pro. The benchmark does not include Anthropic’s Claude models.
